description: WireMock provides API simulation and mocking tools, including a hosted WireMock Cloud product and related developer tooling for creating, managing, and testing against mock APIs. It is used to simulate external services and API dependencies during development and testing.
summary: WireMock.io exposes a WireMock Cloud REST API at `https://api.wiremock.cloud/v1`, a Node-installed `wiremock` CLI, and an MCP server launched via `wiremock mcp`; all require WireMock-issued credentials.
